products.name: IRIS AM

evidence.snippet:
UTM and Counter-UAS
----------------------
##### See how our IRIS AM (Airspace Management) solution is enabling Counter-UAS operations, Airspace Monitoring, and Unmanned Traffic Management in North America and Europe.
[TerraLens® powers the real-time display in the IRIS AM™ Airspace Management System](https://kongsberggeospatial.com/products/terralens)

products.notes: Dedicated product page (resource-0006) rendered IRIS GCS content; description derived from home page and news articles.
